form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. Reid submitted the following resolution; which was considered and agreed to

form.official-title: To constitute the majority party's membership on certain committees for the One Hundred Twelfth Congress, or until their successors are chosen.

section.text: That the following shall constitute the majority party's membership on the following committees for the One Hundred Twelfth Congress, or until their successors are chosen:

committee-appointment-paragraph.header: Committee on Agriculture, Nutrition, and Forestry:
committee-appointment-paragraph.text: Ms. Stabenow (Chairman), Mr. Leahy, Mr. Harkin, Mr. Conrad, Mr. Baucus, Mr. Nelson (Nebraska), Mr. Brown (Ohio), Mr. Casey, Ms. Klobuchar, Mr. Bennet, and Mrs. Gillibrand.

Mr. Inouye (Chairman), Mr. Leahy, Mr. Harkin, Ms. Mikulski, Mr. Kohl, Mrs. Murray, Mrs. Feinstein, Mr. Durbin, Mr. Johnson (South Dakota), Ms. Landrieu, Mr. Reed, Mr. Lautenberg, Mr. Nelson (Nebraska), Mr. Pryor, Mr. Tester, and Mr. Brown (Ohio).

Mr. Levin (Chairman), Mr. Lieberman, Mr. Reed, Mr. Akaka, Mr. Nelson (Nebraska), Mr. Webb, Mrs. McCaskill, Mr. Udall (Colorado), Mrs. Hagan, Mr. Begich, Mr. Manchin, Mrs. Shaheen, Mrs. Gillibrand, and Mr. Blumenthal.

committee-appointment-paragraph.header: Committee on Banking, Housing, and Urban Affairs:
committee-appointment-paragraph.text: Mr. Johnson (South Dakota) (Chairman), Mr. Reed, Mr. Schumer, Mr. Menendez, Mr. Akaka, Mr. Brown (Ohio), Mr. Tester, Mr. Kohl, Mr. Warner, Mr. Merkley, Mr. Bennet, and Mrs. Hagan.

committee-appointment-paragraph.header: Committee on Commerce, Science, and Transportation:
committee-appointment-paragraph.text: Mr. Rockefeller (Chairman), Mr. Inouye, Mr. Kerry, Mrs. Boxer, Mr. Nelson (Florida), Ms. Cantwell, Mr. Lautenberg, Mr. Pryor, Mrs. McCaskill, Ms. Klobuchar, Mr. Udall (New Mexico), Mr. Warner, and Mr. Begich.

committee-appointment-paragraph.header: Committee on Energy and Natural Resources:
committee-appointment-paragraph.text: Mr. Bingaman (Chairman), Mr. Wyden, Mr. Johnson (South Dakota), Ms. Landrieu, Ms. Cantwell, Mr. Sanders, Ms. Stabenow, Mr. Udall (Colorado), Mrs. Shaheen, Mr. Franken, Mr. Manchin, and Mr. Coons.

committee-appointment-paragraph.header: Committee on the Environment and Public Works:
committee-appointment-paragraph.text: Mrs. Boxer (Chairman), Mr. Baucus, Mr. Carper, Mr. Lautenberg, Mr. Cardin, Mr. Sanders, Mr. Whitehouse, Mr. Udall (New Mexico), Mr. Merkley, and Mrs. Gillibrand.
Mr. Baucus (Chairman), Mr. Rockefeller, Mr. Conrad, Mr. Bingaman, Mr. Kerry, Mr. Wyden, Mr. Schumer, Ms. Stabenow, Ms. Cantwell, Mr. Nelson (Florida), Mr. Menendez, Mr. Carper, and Mr. Cardin.
Mr. Kerry (Chairman), Mrs. Boxer, Mr. Menendez, Mr. Cardin, Mr. Casey, Mr. Webb, Mrs. Shaheen, Mr. Coons, Mr. Durbin, and Mr. Udall (New Mexico).

committee-appointment-paragraph.header: Committee on Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions:
committee-appointment-paragraph.text: Mr. Harkin (Chairman), Ms. Mikulski, Mr. Bingaman, Mrs. Murray, Mr. Sanders, Mr. Casey, Mrs. Hagan, Mr. Merkley, Mr. Franken, Mr. Bennet, Mr. Whitehouse, and Mr. Blumenthal.

committee-appointment-paragraph.header: Committee on Homeland Security and Governmental Affairs:
committee-appointment-paragraph.text: Mr. Lieberman (Chairman), Mr. Levin, Mr. Akaka, Mr. Carper, Mr. Pryor, Ms. Landrieu, Mrs. McCaskill, Mr. Tester, and Mr. Begich.
Mr. Leahy (Chairman), Mr. Kohl, Mrs. Feinstein, Mr. Schumer, Mr. Durbin, Mr. Whitehouse, Ms. Klobuchar, Mr. Franken, Mr. Coons, and Mr. Blumenthal.
Mrs. Feinstein (Chairman), Mr. Rockefeller, Mr. Wyden, Ms. Mikulski, Mr. Nelson (Florida), Mr. Conrad, Mr. Udall (Colorado), and Mr. Warner.
Mr. Conrad (Chairman), Mrs. Murray, Mr. Wyden, Mr. Nelson (Florida), Ms. Stabenow, Mr. Cardin, Mr. Sanders, Mr. Whitehouse, Mr. Warner, Mr. Merkley, Mr. Begich, and Mr. Coons.
Mr. Schumer (Chairman), Mr. Inouye, Mrs. Feinstein, Mr. Durbin, Mr. Nelson (Nebraska), Mrs. Murray, Mr. Pryor, Mr. Udall (New Mexico), Mr. Warner, and Mr. Leahy.

committee-appointment-paragraph.header: Committee on Small Business and Entrepreneurship:
committee-appointment-paragraph.text: Ms. Landrieu (Chairman), Mr. Levin, Mr. Harkin, Mr. Kerry, Mr. Lieberman, Ms. Cantwell, Mr. Pryor, Mr. Cardin, Mrs. Shaheen, and Mrs. Hagan.
Mrs. Murray (Chairman), Mr. Rockefeller, Mr. Akaka, Mr. Sanders, Mr. Brown (Ohio), Mr. Webb, Mr. Tester, and Mr. Begich.
Mr. Kohl (Chairman), Mr. Wyden, Mr. Nelson (Florida), Mr. Casey, Mrs. McCaskill, Mr. Whitehouse, Mr. Udall (Colorado), Mr. Bennet, Mrs. Gillibrand, Mr. Manchin, and Mr. Blumenthal.
Mr. Casey (Chairman), Mr. Bingaman, Ms. Klobuchar, Mr. Webb, Mr. Warner, and Mr. Sanders.
Mrs. Boxer (Chairman), Mr. Pryor, and Mr. Brown (Ohio).
Mr. Akaka (Chairman), Mr. Inouye, Mr. Conrad, Mr. Johnson (South Dakota), Ms. Cantwell, Mr. Tester, Mr. Udall (New Mexico), and Mr. Franken.
